reflections.title: Stop re-reading the same files every turn
reflections.body: Across nine runs I re-read config.py and types.py on almost every turn instead of caching the first read, burning roughly 18k tokens. Read each file once per run and reuse it.

reflections.title: Deploy step retries silently after a timeout
reflections.body: Two runs hit a deploy timeout and retried without surfacing the failure, so a half-applied deploy looked successful. Make the retry visible and stop after one failed attempt.

reflections.title: Shorten web_search queries before calling
reflections.body: web_search failed on about 40 percent of calls, all of them long multi-clause queries. Split the intent into shorter queries before calling the tool.

reflections.title: Who owns release notes, Writer or me?
reflections.body: Two goals about release notes bounced between Coordinator and Writer before either picked them up. A human should set the default owner so routing is unambiguous.

reflections.title: Vary opening sentences across drafts
reflections.body: Six of the last eight drafts opened with the same construction. Keep a short list of recent openings and avoid repeating them.

reflections.title: Delegation routing cut idle handoffs in half
reflections.body: The new routing heuristic dropped idle handoffs from twelve to five across the day. Worth keeping and extending to the Operator queue.

reflections.title: Chunk long outputs to stop truncation
reflections.body: Long tool outputs were truncated mid-structure. Chunking anything over 4k tokens fixed it.
reflections.resolution: Shipped output chunking. No truncation since.

reflections.title: Source verification caught three bad citations
reflections.body: The verify-before-cite pass flagged three sources that did not support the claim. Keep running it on every research report.

reflections.title: Rewrite every system prompt in active voice
reflections.body: Proposed rewriting all five system prompts at once for tone consistency.
reflections.resolution: Dismissed: too broad and risky to change every prompt at once. Not worth the churn right now.

reflections.title: Add a daily end-of-day handoff summary
reflections.body: Proposed a short end-of-day summary of open handoffs so nothing is dropped overnight.
reflections.resolution: Accepted: scheduling a daily 18:00 handoff summary.
